description: Technical rules learned from production errors. Shared across all skills.

adf_construction: NEVER use {jira:KEY} shortcodes — they generate broken URLs pointing to your-instance.atlassian.net
Always build inlineCard nodes with explicit URLs: https://endios.atlassian.net/browse/PMPO-XXXX
Status lozenges: use ADF status nodes with color attribute (green, yellow, red, neutral). {status:text|color:X} shortcode renders incorrectly as grey/neutral.
Panel types: {warning}...{warning} shortcode creates panelType 'error' (red), not 'warning' (yellow). Use ADF panel node with explicit panelType.
delta_patch_tools: confluence_update_table_cell with bulletList does NOT parse markdown bold (**text**). Use plaintext or build full ADF for rich formatting in table cells.
Inline links work in delta-patch tools.
Transient 401 errors can occur — retry once before failing.

iframe_embed.note: Use ADF extension node with extensionKey 'iframe' to embed Jira dashboards

jql_patterns.active_initiatives: project=PMPO AND type=Initiative AND status NOT IN (Done, Rejected, "Roadmap Candidate") ORDER BY rank ASC
jql_patterns.finished_since: project=PMPO AND type=Initiative AND status changed AFTER "{date}" AND status IN (Done, Rejected)
jql_patterns.activated_since: project=PMPO AND type=Initiative AND status changed AFTER "{date}" AND status WAS "Roadmap Candidate"

jira.or_clause_warning: When using OR in JQL, always parenthesize each clause. OR without grouping searches ALL projects.

smart_links.note: All Jira smart links in ADF must use inlineCard nodes with this base URL + issue key

granola.best_practice: Use targeted query_granola_meetings with specific initiative/person questions instead of reading full transcripts. Full transcripts are 10-20KB each.
